item.title: robpizzola: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 40min I've been asked enough times that I'll share my NHL Playoff fair series prices. Full tra
item.description:
Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 40min I've been asked enough times that I'll share my NHL Playoff fair series prices. Full transparency these may not be good enough to beat market at this time, but I have been using them to actively add to positions today.
PIT -117 / PHI +117 BUF -209 / BOS +209 CAR -126 / OTT +126 Mostrar más 15 1 62 3 mil
